entities.name: Resume-Matching AI

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company using story-based approach as alternative to resume matching

entities.name: ATS
entities.context: Traditional Applicant Tracking System filtering becoming worthless due to AI commoditization

entities.name: Story-based matching
entities.context: Alternative hiring approach that goes beyond resume, focuses on candidate stories and context

entities.name: FOHE
entities.context: Community whose members (non-technical/career transitioners) benefit from story-based matching

entities.name: Soft skills
entities.context: Human capabilities that are hard to automate and becoming more valuable in hiring

entities.name: Resume commoditization
entities.context: Belief that resume as differentiator is dying due to AI automation

entities.name: Hiring fragmentation
entities.context: Trend of employers moving away from centralized job boards to internal tools, referrals, niche sourcing

entities.name: Career transitioners
entities.context: People most hurt by resume-only systems, primary beneficiaries of story-based matching

relationships.context: AI commoditizes traditional ATS keyword filtering systems
Platform built on story-based approach as market differentiator
FOHE positioned to solve market problem with story-based matching
